response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of polyglot software engineering experience with notable GIS/geospatial exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, plus relevant low-latency systems work in DLang at Sociomantic. However, the role specifically requires modern C++ or Rust expertise, and the resume shows only brief, dated C/C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015) with no Rust experience. Recent work is heavily TypeScript/Node.js focused, making this a significant skills gap for a routing tiling pipeline role.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems exposure
concerns: Minimal and dated C++ experience; no Rust experience listed
Recent stack is web/TypeScript-focused, not systems programming
No direct navigation/routing pipeline or map data tiling experience
